title: arenaria rotundifolia subsp. pancicii
intro: Arenaria rotundifolia subsp. pancicii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Arenaria rotundifolia subsp. pancicii include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have a range of health benefits when consumed.
